message:
refactor(tests): replace 'as any' casts with type-safe alternatives

Test files used 'as any' broadly — for NextRequest construction,
framer-motion mock destructuring, fetch mocking, and review fixture
typing. These suppress all type checking at the cast boundary,
hiding real type errors.

Replaced with:
- 'as unknown as Record<string, unknown>' for NextRequest signal plumbing
- 'as unknown as typeof fetch' for global fetch mocking
- 'as unknown as Review' / 'as unknown as RatingSummary' for fixtures
- Simplified framer-motion mocks to use rest spreading instead of
  explicitly destructuring every motion prop (which broke whenever
  framer-motion added new props)
- Explicit transition type annotations for motion-variants assertions

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
